src/main/java/pl/gry/lotto/infrastructur.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/pl/gry/lotto/infrastructur.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes a compile-time 'package does not exist' error in Spring Boot 3.x environments.

src/main/java/pl/gry/lotto/infrastructur.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/pl/gry/lotto/infrastructur.why_exists: The javax.validation package is no longer available in Spring Boot 3.x / Jakarta EE 9+ environments, causing a compile-time 'package not found' error.
